LanguageData.MSS_MRStreamer: Rimworld: Steampunk by Mr Samuel Streamer on Youtube
LanguageData.MSS_FP_Settings_DrawByMrStreamer: Show "By Mr Samuel Streamer" label in the bottom left (only used to disuade video theft and other digital larceny, leave disabled)
LanguageData.MSSFP_RGSettingsCategory: Mr Samuel Streamer Flavour Pack - Resource Generator
LanguageData.MSS_FP_GeneEventChance_Tooltop: The chance for gene selections to appear on e.g. growth moments
LanguageData.MSS_FP_GoodGeneChance_Tooltip: The chance for events that give genes to give good genes.
LanguageData.MSS_FP_BadGeneChance_Tooltip: The chance for events that give genes to give bad genes.
LanguageData.MSS_FP_NeutralGeneChance_Tooltip: The chance for events that give genes to give neutral genes.
LanguageData.MSS_FP_RandomGeneChance_Tooltip: The chance for events that give genes to give random genes.
LanguageData.MSS_FP_Settings_DaysForOutpostFission: Days between fissions in outposts -> {0} days
LanguageData.MSS_FP_Settings_AllowAnyPregnant: Allow any pawn to get pregnant
LanguageData.MSS_FP_Settings_SingleUseMentalFuses: Patch the Altered Carbon 2 Mental Fuse to be single use
LanguageData.MSS_FP_Settings_EnableGraveHaunts: Enable dynamic grave haunts (any buried colonist can haunt nearby pawns)
LanguageData.MSS_FP_Settings_ShowHauntDevDashboard: Show haunts dev dashboard (requires dev mode)
LanguageData.MSS_FP_Settings_AlwaysShowNamedHaunts: Always show named haunt spirits (ignores drafted requirement)
LanguageData.MSS_FP_Settings_HauntProgressionSpeed_To: Scales how quickly named haunts grow in power. At 100% (default), haunts passively gain ~0.03–0.05 severity per day. Aligned actions (kills, recruitments, etc.) give larger bursts on top of this. Reaching full Awakened stage takes roughly 10–20 days passively, or much faster with the right actions. 400% roughly quadruples all rates; 25% makes progression very slow.
LanguageData.MSS_FP_Settings_HauntRegressionSpeed_Too: Scales how quickly haunts fade when neglected. At 100% (default), a haunt loses ~0.015–0.02 severity per day after 5+ days with no aligned actions. Set to 0% to disable regression entirely — haunts will never fade once gained.
LanguageData.MSS_FP_Settings_DisableBSIncorporateGene: Disable the complexity limit for the B&S Incorporate gene
LanguageData.MSS_FP_Settings_EnableExtendedMetabolism: Enable extended metabolism multiplier based on gene complexity (above 225%)
LanguageData.MSS_FP_Settings_EnableNonsenseIncidents: Enable the nonsense events (e.g. Scrungle has been Bloorped).
LanguageData.MSS_FP_Settings_OverrideFactionLeaderSpa: Allow faction leaders to spawn on maps.
LanguageData.MSS_FP_Settings_BoostChanceToSpawnExisti: Boosts the chance for worldpawns to be part of raids, settlements, etc.
LanguageData.MSS_FP_Settings_EnableGeneStealerNeed: Enable the Gene Stealer need for the Big and Small Incorporate Gene
LanguageData.MSS_FP_Settings_EnableGenesOnGrowthMomen: Enable giving new genes on growth moments
LanguageData.MSS_FP_Settings_EnableGeneMutators: Enable gene mutators, e.g Heat Wave has a chance to give heat related genes
LanguageData.MSS_FP_Settings_WanderDelaySeconds_Toolt: Modify the delay before pawns start wandering around the map
LanguageData.MSS_FP_Settings_TenSecondsToSpeedDelay_T: How many seconds to wait before automatically switching to ultrafast speed
LanguageData.MSS_FP_Settings_TechsToGetPoints: Tech levels to get reformation points [{0}]
LanguageData.MSS_FP_Settings_ReformationPointsForTech: Reformation points each set of tech levels [{0}]
LanguageData.MSS_FP_Settings_EnableRecoilDamage: Enable recoil damage for small pawns
LanguageData.MSS_FP_Settings_EnableRecoilKnockback: Enable recoil knockback for small pawns
LanguageData.MSS_FP_Settings_FactionLeaderRaidChance_: Chance that a faction leader will appear in a raid.
LanguageData.MSS_FP_Settings_NullDefSafetyPatch: Filter null defs in research unlocks (compatibility fix)
LanguageData.MSS_FP_AwakeningGene_Msg: {0} has been marked by the awakened essence of {1}.
LanguageData.MSS_FP_Settings_PoltergeistIntensityMult: Scales how readily poltergeist events fire. Intensity is the sum of all haunt severities on the map (e.g. 3 haunts at 0.5 severity = 1.5 intensity). At 100% with default threshold 0.5, a single Awakened haunt (severity ~1.0) will trigger events. 200% halves the effective threshold; 50% doubles it.
LanguageData.MSS_FP_Settings_PoltergeistEventThreshol: Minimum effective intensity (intensity × time multiplier × intensity multiplier) required to trigger events. Default 0.50 means a single Awakened haunt at full severity triggers events during the day. At night (21:00–05:00) intensity is multiplied by 1.5×, so events fire more easily. Colony size also scales the threshold up (10% per colonist above 5).
LanguageData.MSS_FP_Exorcism_Success_Msg: {0}'s spirit of {1} has been successfully exorcised.
LanguageData.MSS_FP_Exorcism_Partial_Msg: The spirit of {1} was driven from {0}, but the separation was traumatic.
LanguageData.MSS_FP_Exorcism_Failure_Msg: The exorcism of {0} failed — the spirit of {1} has grown stronger in defiance.
LanguageData.MSS_FP_Exorcism_Failure_Reason: The failed exorcism left a spiritual wound.
LanguageData.MSS_FP_Exorcism_Backlash_Msg: The expelled spirit lashed out before departing, filling the room near {0} with dread.
LanguageData.MSS_FP_Settings_EnableKillHaunts: Enable kill haunts (colonists may be haunted by their victims)
LanguageData.MSS_FP_Settings_KillHauntBaseChance_Tool: Base probability of a colonist becoming haunted after killing a humanlike pawn. The actual chance diminishes with each active bad haunt on the killer: chance = base / (1 + active bad haunts). HauntSensitive pawns have 1.5x this chance.
LanguageData.MSS_FP_KillHaunt_Letter_Text: The spirit of {0} refuses to pass on. It clings to {1}, filled with resentment and fury. The haunting will grow stronger over time, draining skills and inviting dark events.\n\nAn exorcism may be able to sever the bond — but it won't be easy.
LanguageData.MSS_FP_Haunt_InitialLetter_Text: The spirit of {0} lingers near {1}. Their presence is faint — barely a whisper — but the bond between the living and the dead has taken root.\n\nOver time, the spirit may grow stronger, granting skills and abilities tied to who they were in life. If neglected, the connection will fade.
LanguageData.MSS_FP_Haunt_StagePresence_Msg: The spirit near {0} grows stronger — {1}'s presence is unmistakable now.
LanguageData.MSS_FP_Haunt_StageAwakened_Msg: {1}'s spirit has fully awakened within {0}. The bond is deep and powerful.
LanguageData.MSS_FP_Event_FlickeringLights_Msg: The spirit of {1} caused lights near {0} to flicker and die.
LanguageData.MSS_FP_Event_ObjectDisplacement_Msg: The spirit of {1} moved the {0} on its own.
LanguageData.MSS_FP_Event_ColdSpot_Msg: The spirit of {1} brought an inexplicable cold near {0}.
LanguageData.MSS_FP_Event_GhostlyWail_Msg: The wail of {0} echoed through the colony.
LanguageData.MSS_FP_Event_SpontaneousFire_Msg: The spirit of {1} started a fire near {0}.
LanguageData.MSS_FP_Event_PossessionAttempt_Msg: The spirit of {1} is trying to take hold of {0}.
LanguageData.MSS_FP_Event_Manifestation_Msg: The spirit of {1} near {0} became fully visible for a moment.
LanguageData.MSS_FP_Poltergeist_FirstEvent_Text:
Strange things have begun happening in the colony. Objects move on their own, lights flicker, and cold drafts blow through sealed rooms.

The vengeful spirits haunting your colonists are growing restless. As their power increases, so will the severity of these disturbances.

An exorcism may be able to drive these spirits away — but it requires a skilled doctor, and the spirits will not go quietly.
LanguageData.MSS_FP_Settings_EnableTemplateWandererJo: Enable template character wanderer joins (named characters may wander into your colony)
LanguageData.MSS_FP_CodexPunch_LetterText:
After ascending to a higher plane and swinging at a god — and missing — Codex has been cast back to the mortal realm. He retains some of his godlike powers, including the ability to teleport at will.

Unfortunately, he has decided that the reason he missed was insufficient punching practice. He now intends to punch every mortal being in existence before ascending again.

{0} appears to be next on his list.
LanguageData.MSS_FP_Settings_GeneratorFasterUpgradesN: Makes all Genetron upgrade requirements 1/4 of their original time.\nRequires game restart to take effect.
LanguageData.MSS_FP_Settings_AddThingDefToResourceGen: Add ThingDef to resource generator list
LanguageData.MSS_FP_Settings_ShowExportGizmo: Show Export Pawn gizmo on colonists
LanguageData.MSS_FP_Settings_EnableUserTemplateLoadin: Load user-exported pawn templates for use in events
